pearl_stack_large.title: Stockpile 64 Ender Pearls for late-game teleportation needs

ender_overhaul_notes.title: Document your Enderman encounters — note which variants you have found and where

subtitle.text: The previous civilizations knew the Endermen. They stopped paying attention to them. That was a mistake.

description: 64 Ender Pearls is the deep-game logistics reserve.
In Ch15-17, you will be traveling large distances rapidly.
Pearls are emergency teleportation and void recovery.
Use a book or Antique Atlas to record your Enderman variants:
Which biome. What behavior. What dropped.
The Magical Enderman especially — document it if found.
This is the Exposure camera principle applied to biology:
Documentation is the thing that distinguishes this civilization from the previous eleven.
The previous civilizations all reached the End.
None of them wrote down what they found here.
You are going to write it down.
